name: instant-api — SLO GET /api/v1/resources p95 > 200ms (10m)
description: Page when the p95 latency of GET /api/v1/resources exceeds the 30-day SLO target (200ms) for 10 minutes. This is the dashboard read path — every authenticated UI page calls it, so latency directly drives perceived dashboard responsiveness. Sourced from Transaction events emitted by the Fiber NR middleware.

nrql.query: SELECT percentile(duration, 95) * 1000 FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' AND request.uri = '/api/v1/resources'
